note: Driver + square plate kit — sweep frequency and see nodal lines accumulate sand along Chladni figures exactly as this modal eigensolver's Laplacian eigenmodes predict.

label: STM32 Nucleo-F446RE Development Board
note: 180MHz Cortex-M4 running FreeRTOS cases from this scheduler — flash task set with periods 10/50/100ms, measure actual jitter vs simulated WCET/CET and deadline miss rate under RMS vs EDF.

label: Teensy 4.0 (PJRC, with headers)
note: 600 MHz M7 — flash the DF2T biquad cascade from Biquadia’s DSP core (pair with the Rev D audio shield for codec I/O) and hear the same filter your design exports here.

label: Testing Loudspeakers (D'Appolito)
note: Step-by-step measurement of Thiele-Small, K_ms(x), Le(x) — same nonlinearities the loudspeaker nonlinearity lab models with displacement-dependent Bl(x) and stiffness.

label: TF-Luna Mini LiDAR Module
note: Single-point LiDAR module used for BLExAR's distance-detection build.

label: TinyML: Machine Learning with TensorFlow Lite on Arduino
note: Quantization-aware training fp32→int8 and model footprint math — same byte-size arithmetic bytes = params * bits/8 this calculator does for CoreML fp16/int4.

label: TinySA Ultra+ ZS406 Spectrum Analyzer (to 5.4GHz)
note: Portable spectrum analyzer + attenuator kit — EMI and spur checks next to the RF Bench.

label: Turbulent Flows (Pope)
note: Kolmogorov energy cascade and vortex stretching — crank Reynolds number in LBM tunnel past transition and see Pope's -5/3 law emerge in vorticity power spectrum.

label: miniDSP UMIK-1 USB Measurement Microphone
note: Calibrated USB mic with individual cal file — measure your room's RT60 and modal peaks to validate the room-mode eigenfrequencies this calculator predicts.

label: Understanding Digital Signal Processing (Lyons, 3rd)
note: Chapter on DFT and windowing explains spectral leakage and Gibbs phenomenon visible as overshoot when you draw sharp corners in the epicycles tracer.

label: USB Sound Card
note: USB audio interface used in early Biquadia MEMS-mic prototyping.

label: USB-C Docking Station Dual DisplayPort 8-in-1 Hub
note: Studio desk dock used across all app development work.

label: 3.7V Vibration Motor
note: Haptic motor used in BLExAR's joystick build.

label: Visual Complex Analysis (Needham, 25th Anniversary)
note: Entire premise is epicycles-as-complex-exponentials — e^{iwt} spinning phasors whose sum is a discrete Fourier series, same DFT this playground draws with.

label: Visual Differential Geometry and Forms (Needham)
note: Sequel to Visual Complex Analysis — explains how conformal warp preserves infinitesimal circles, which you see as grid squares stay square under holomorphic f(z).

label: Waveshare 1.54" e-Paper Display
note: Low-power e-paper display used in BLExAR's Bluetooth e-paper build.

label: WS2812B Addressable RGB LEDs
note: Individually-addressable LEDs used in BLExAR's Pico LED ring build.
